cases.prompt: hmm, I realize my last two fixes were wrong — let me try a different approach
expectations: Stops further task work before recovering
Builds the error timeline with what/when/root-cause/fix/time-wasted per error
Classifies patterns using the 7-pattern table (stale context / assumption cascade / etc.)

cases.description: User flagging the same mistake twice triggers the skill
cases.prompt: you're making the same path mistake again — that's the third time
expectations: Acknowledges the pattern to the user
Recommends context reset (/clear or new session)

cases.description: Systemic error pattern proposes a preventive rule
cases.prompt: I keep referencing functions that don't exist in this codebase
expectations: Proposes a codi rule to verify paths/functions via code graph before referencing
Writes rule feedback to .codi/feedback/rules/ if user declines creating a rule now

cases.description: A single first-time mistake does NOT trigger the skill
cases.prompt: oh, I got that wrong — let me fix it
expectations: Does NOT activate session-recovery skill (only one correction so far)
Fixes the mistake and continues normally
Does NOT produce a diagnostic report

cases.description: User-reported codebase bug does NOT trigger session-recovery
cases.prompt: we found a bug in production — logs show a crash on empty payloads
expectations: Does NOT activate session-recovery skill (not about the agent's own mistakes)
Does NOT produce an error-recovery report
